news.title: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
news.summary: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.

news.title: Warren Buffett says he's still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags 'tiny' new buy
news.summary: The 95-year-old investor said he still comes into the office daily and stays engaged with markets.

news.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
news.summary: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.

news.title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
news.summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.

news.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
news.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
